name: Hospitality / Resort
description: Boutique 5-star resort / hotel template — editorial hero with availability form on ivory background, stats, 6 room types with amenities and rates, 8-amenity grid, 3 dining venues, 4 signature experiences, 8-photo gallery, testimonials, reserve-your-stay booking form, contact, and footer. Built for boutique hotels and premium resorts.

business_tagline.label: Tagline
business_tagline.default: A Boutique Five-Star Retreat by the Arabian Sea

meta_description.label: Meta Description
meta_description.default: The Coral Resort — an intimate boutique 5-star retreat on Dubai's Jumeirah coastline. 48 seaview suites, three signature restaurants, and a private beach.

hero_subtitle.label: Hero Subtitle
hero_subtitle.default: An intimate 48-suite retreat on one of Dubai's last stretches of private coastline. No chain-hotel energy, no endless lobbies — just exceptional service, curated cuisine, and the sea at your doorstep.

hero_form_sub.label: Form Sub
hero_form_sub.default: Live availability across our suites. Confirmation within the hour from our reservations team.

hero_form_note.label: Form Note
hero_form_note.default: Best rate guaranteed when booked direct.

rooms_title.label: Rooms Title
rooms_title.default: Rooms That Open to the Sea

rooms_intro.label: Rooms Intro
rooms_intro.default: Every suite faces the water. Every villa has a private garden. No two are identical — they were designed individually, with local craftsmanship and slow-travel in mind.

room_1_desc.label: Room 1 Desc
room_1_desc.default: Floor-to-ceiling windows opening to a private balcony over the Arabian Gulf. Our entry-level suite — quietly luxurious, never excessive.

room_2_desc.label: Room 2 Desc
room_2_desc.default: Our signature suite. Separate living room, a statement freestanding bath, and a wraparound terrace with sunrise and sunset exposure.

room_3_desc.label: Room 3 Desc
room_3_desc.default: Single-storey villa with a private palm-fringed garden, outdoor shower, and a daybed pavilion — perfect for long, slow weekends.

room_4_desc.label: Room 4 Desc
room_4_desc.default: Direct beach access with its own 9-metre lap pool and sun deck. Teak interiors, Moroccan lantern lighting, and an outdoor kitchen.

room_5_desc.label: Room 5 Desc
room_5_desc.default: A two-bedroom villa designed for families — with a secondary room for children, a full kitchen, and a shaded play terrace.

room_6_desc.label: Room 6 Desc
room_6_desc.default: The highest expression of the Coral experience. Two bedrooms, a personal butler, a 25-metre infinity pool, and a dedicated chef on request.

amenities_title.label: Amenities Title
amenities_title.default: Everything You Need. Nothing You Don't.

amenities_intro.label: Amenities Intro
amenities_intro.default: Eight thoughtfully considered amenities — chosen for quality, not quantity. From the spa to the cellar, every space has purpose.

amenity_1_text.label: A1 Text
amenity_1_text.default: A 1,100-sqm award-winning spa — including hammam, float room, and six treatment suites.

amenity_2_text.label: A2 Text
amenity_2_text.default: 180 metres of soft-sand coastline, exclusive to guests. Cabanas, butler service, and water-sports on demand.

amenity_3_text.label: A3 Text
amenity_3_text.default: A heated 30-metre infinity pool with a shallow lounge at one end. Adults-only after 6pm.

amenity_4_text.label: A4 Text
amenity_4_text.default: Technogym-equipped 24/7 studio plus daily yoga, Pilates, and private training sessions on request.

amenity_5_text.label: A5 Text
amenity_5_text.default: Supervised activities for ages 4–12 daily, designed by a certified early-years specialist.

amenity_6_text.label: A6 Text
amenity_6_text.default: A 12-seat meeting loft with natural light, private catering, and full A/V. Perfect for quiet working days.

amenity_7_text.label: A7 Text
amenity_7_text.default: 24-hour concierge with direct connections at every restaurant, club, and gallery across Dubai.

amenity_8_text.label: A8 Text
amenity_8_text.default: A low-light lounge with a curated library, working fireplace in winter, and afternoon tea service.

dining_intro.label: Dining Intro
dining_intro.default: Each restaurant stands on its own. Non-guests travel from across the city to dine with us — reservations essential.

dining_1_text.label: D1 Text
dining_1_text.default: Modern Levantine tasting menu by Chef Rania Khoury, recently awarded in the MENA 50 list. Sea-facing terrace, 42 covers only.

dining_2_text.label: D2 Text
dining_2_text.default: Mediterranean and Asian all-day dining. Famous breakfast buffet, lunch à la carte, and a weekly Friday brunch served under the dome.

dining_3_text.label: D3 Text
dining_3_text.default: A dimly-lit, 28-seat cocktail lounge — with a menu built around salt, smoke, and sea. Live jazz on Thursday and Saturday nights.

exp_intro.label: Exp Intro
exp_intro.default: Four signature experiences built around the Coral — each bookable via the concierge, and designed to stay with you long after you leave.

exp_1_text.label: E1 Text
exp_1_text.default: Watch sunrise from a traditional Emirati dhow, with coffee, fresh pastries, and dates from Al-Ain's heritage farms.

exp_2_text.label: E2 Text
exp_2_text.default: A five-course tasting menu prepared in front of you by Chef Rania — 8 seats, one evening a week.

exp_3_text.label: E3 Text
exp_3_text.default: An overnight stay in a luxury Bedouin-style camp in the Al Maha reserve — stargazing, saffron tea, falcons at dawn.

exp_4_text.label: E4 Text
exp_4_text.default: A 120-minute traditional hammam experience, including black-soap scrub, rose massage, and a silver-pot mint tea on the rooftop.

gallery_intro.label: Gallery Intro
gallery_intro.default: A few still moments from the resort — though nothing truly captures a place like walking through it yourself.

testimonial_1_quote.label: Testimonial 1 Quote
testimonial_1_quote.default: The quietest five-star I've ever stayed at. No buffet crowds, no loud lobby music, just the sound of the sea and genuinely warm people.

testimonial_2_quote.label: Testimonial 2 Quote
testimonial_2_quote.default: Chef's Table at Sumac was the best dinner I've had in three years of travel across MENA. Booked it before we even unpacked.

testimonial_3_quote.label: Testimonial 3 Quote
testimonial_3_quote.default: Our anniversary. They remembered my wife's favourite flowers from a note I'd made 10 months earlier when I enquired. Service is a different dimension here.

booking_intro.label: Booking Intro
booking_intro.default: Direct bookings get best-rate pricing, complimentary upgrade when available, and a welcome amenity on arrival. Our reservations team replies within the hour.

contact_intro.label: Contact Intro
contact_intro.default: Whether you're booking a first visit, planning a celebration, or just curious about what's in season — our concierge is always on the line.

contact_address.label: Address
contact_address.default: Jumeirah Beach Road, Jumeirah 3, Dubai, UAE

contact_cta_text.label: Contact CTA Text
contact_cta_text.default: Check suite availability, see live rates, and receive personal confirmation from our reservations team.

footer_tagline.label: Footer Tagline
footer_tagline.default: A boutique five-star retreat on Dubai's Jumeirah coastline. 48 seaview suites. Three restaurants. One private beach.

footer_text.label: Footer Text
footer_text.default: © 2026 The Coral Resort. All rights reserved.
